title: Hideaki Anno interview I cant find
display_title: Hideaki Anno interview I cant find
wikitext:
[]: Hideaki Anno interview I can't find             Quote Post by Draconis » Wed Apr 04, 2012 10:37 am I remember reading an interview posted on this site a while ago where Anno talked about his disdain for Japan's obsession with youth. I can't find it via search (I don't know if I'm searching for the wrong terms or something), but could someone find it for me? Thanks in advance.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Apr 04, 2012 11:30 am Don't remember anything about a "disdain for Japan's obsession with youth", but are you referring to him thinking all adults in Japan are children?

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Fri Apr 06, 2012 10:52 am Sounds like the Atlantic interview to me too.

[]:             Quote Post by Mt Olympus » Sat Apr 07, 2012 10:47 pm After reading that interview I would agree with Anno's sentiments. I think it has to do more with the spread of Christianity and the subsequent European "invaders", with the knowledge they brought caused a massive culture shock. However I think it's more predominant in China. I think this also can be reflected in Evangelion.

However I think it's more predominant in China. I think this also can be reflected in Evangelion.
